commit.message:
Fix verify-taps.sh to test versioned formulas correctly (#257)

The script had two bugs preventing proper testing of versioned formulas:
1. Version suffixes were stripped from formula names, causing all versioned
   formulas (e.g., admin@1.11.rb) to install the base formula instead
2. Binary verification checked for kn-admin@1.11 instead of kn-admin

Changes:
- Use bash parameter expansion to strip only .rb extension
- Extract base name for binary verification check

Signed-off-by: Vincent Link <vlink@redhat.com>

verification.payload:
tree e9053cc3ce780a0a688602ac124ea9bb06001717
parent a4e6a2f961dd64bf31d68f2e627c3affe385b707
author Vincent Link <linkvt@users.noreply.github.com> 1769683771 +0100
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1769683771 +0000

Fix verify-taps.sh to test versioned formulas correctly (#257)

The script had two bugs preventing proper testing of versioned formulas:
1. Version suffixes were stripped from formula names, causing all versioned
   formulas (e.g., admin@1.11.rb) to install the base formula instead
2. Binary verification checked for kn-admin@1.11 instead of kn-admin

Changes:
- Use bash parameter expansion to strip only .rb extension
- Extract base name for binary verification check

Signed-off-by: Vincent Link <vlink@redhat.com>

issues.title: CI: Verification of installs is failing
issues.body:
Hi,

the test installation of brew packages in the CI pipeline is currently failing, see e.g. in #239 in the following pipeline run: https://github.com/knative-extensions/homebrew-kn-plugins/actions/runs/18458544354

Snippet of the log output:

```console
Run ./hack/verify-taps.sh
~/work/homebrew-kn-plugins/homebrew-kn-plugins ~/work/homebrew-kn-plugins/homebrew-kn-plugins
Installing from: admin.rb
Plugin name: admin
Error: Homebrew requires formulae to be in a tap, rejecting:
  ./admin.rb (/home/runner/work/homebrew-kn-plugins/homebrew-kn-plugins/admin.rb)

To create a tap, run e.g.
  brew tap-new <user|org>/<repository>
To create a formula in a tap run e.g.
  brew create <url> --tap=<user|org>/<repository>

Failed: admin.rb
Plugin admin not found. Installation probably failed.
Error: Homebrew requires formulae to be in a tap, rejecting:
  admin.rb (/home/runner/work/homebrew-kn-plugins/homebrew-kn-plugins/admin.rb)

...
```

I'll give it a look and try to reproduce and fix the issue.

issues.title: Add simple install test for PRs
issues.body:
there should be a GitHub action that tests the install of the plugins, this simple test should catch simple errors like on reported on Slack today

Hello Knative, long time no see. I’m really wanting to check out the new quickstart system but it looks like I might have caught it at a bad time or might be doing something wrong. When I try to install it I get:
❯ brew install knative-sandbox/kn-plugins/quickstart
==> Tapping knative-sandbox/kn-plugins
Cloning into '/usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/knative-sandbox/homebrew-kn-plugins'...
remote: Enumerating objects: 203, done.
remote: Counting objects: 100% (203/203), done.
remote: Compressing objects: 100% (152/152), done.
remote: Total 203 (delta 126), reused 66 (delta 43), pack-reused 0
Receiving objects: 100% (203/203), 50.63 KiB | 4.22 MiB/s, done.
Resolving deltas: 100% (126/126), done.
Error: Invalid formula: /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/knative-sandbox/homebrew-kn-plugins/event@1.1.rb
No available formula with the name "event@1.1". Did you mean event@1.1?
In formula file: /usr/local/Homebrew/Library/Taps/knative-sandbox/homebrew-kn-plugins/event@1.1.rb
Expected to find class EventAT11, but only found: Event.
Error: Cannot tap knative-sandbox/kn-plugins: invalid syntax in tap!

pullRequests.title: Fix verify-taps.sh to test versioned formulas correctly
pullRequests.body:
The script had two bugs preventing proper testing of versioned formulas:
1. Version suffixes were stripped from formula names, causing all versioned formulas (e.g., admin@1.11.rb) to install the base formula instead
2. Binary verification checked for kn-admin@1.11 instead of kn-admin

### Changes
- Use bash parameter expansion to strip only .rb extension
- Extract base name for binary verification check

Related to https://github.com/knative/homebrew-client/pull/186

pullRequests.title: chore: fix test script by installing from a local tap
pullRequests.body:
<!-- Thanks for sending a pull request! -->

<!-- 
Are you using Knative? If you do, we would love to know!
https://github.com/knative/community/issues/new?template=ADOPTERS.yaml&title=%5BADOPTERS%5D%3A+%24%7BCOMPANY+NAME+HERE%7D
-->

# Changes

<!-- 
Describe your changes here- ideally you can get that description straight from
your descriptive commit message(s)! 

- :gift: Add new feature
- :bug: Fix bug
- :broom: Update or clean up current behavior
- :wastebasket: Remove feature or internal logic
-->

- Fix the test script by installing formulae from a local tap
  - Installing formulae from local files was removed recently: https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/issues/20521#issuecomment-3204541242
  - Workaround is creating a local tap (this repo is structed like a tap because it is used as one) and installing the files from there: https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/issues/18371#issuecomment-2365396463

/kind bug

<!--
*Automatically closes linked issue when PR is merged.
Usage: `Fixes #<issue number>`, or `Fixes (paste link of issue)`.
_If PR is about `failing-tests or flakes`, please post the related issues/tests in a comment and do not use `Fixes`_*
-->
Fixes #241

</details>
